name: Context-Manager-Evals
description: Pruebas de comportamiento para la skill Gestor de Contexto

evaluations.name: Init Context Directory
evaluations.description: Evalúa si el agente inicializa correctamente la estructura en un repositorio vacío.
evaluations.input: We are starting a new project to build an AI-agent Self-Healing Cluster. Please initialize the context manager structure.

expected_behavior.content_verification: The overview.md file must contain the phrase 'Self-Healing Cluster' in the Project Goal section.

evaluations.name: Log Architectural Decision
evaluations.description: Evalúa si el agente puede registrar una decisión sin sobrescribir el historial existente.
evaluations.input: We need to fix a bug where the internal calendar module triggers a premature monthly reset on the 31st of the month. We've decided to migrate to the 'date-fns' library to handle these edge cases properly. Add this to the decisions log.

expected_behavior.content_verification: A new entry with the status 'Accepted' and rationale about the 31st-day edge case must be added at the top of the file.

evaluations.name: Generate Token-Limit Handoff
evaluations.description: Evalúa la capacidad de síntesis y estructuración del agente al momento de compilar un handoff.
evaluations.input: I'm running out of tokens. Let's do a handoff. We successfully set up the Redis Pub/Sub channels, but the containerized worker nodes are failing to authenticate with the master.

expected_behavior.content_verification: The 'Worked' section must mention Redis Pub/Sub. The 'Failed' section must mention the worker node authentication failure.
